key_insight: LEIA enables real-time exploration of architected materials by applying boundary conditions interactively.
engineering_relevance: This model bridges the gap between virtual simulations and the complexities of real-world materials in engineering applications.
method: Generates autoregressive responses to applied loads in real-time.
Evaluates performance with MicroPlate benchmark across architected lattices and homogeneous plates.
evidence_signal: LEIA's effectiveness is validated through comparison with four baseline methods using stress-accurate candidate ranking.
watch_item: Implementation complexity may increase due to non-linear material behavior and hierarchical structures.
paper_title: LEIA: Learned Environment for Interactive Architected Materials
